name: feishu-md-sync-monorepo
description: Workspace root for the feishu-md-sync CLI and documentation site.

scripts.build: npm run build:engine && npm run build:cli
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:cli
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:engine && npm run test:coverage:cli
scripts.test:package: npm run test:package --workspace=feishu-docx-engine && npm run test:package --workspace=feishu-md-sync
scripts.test:skill: npm run build && node scripts/test-agent-skill-validator.mjs && node scripts/test-skill-tree-hash.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-skill.mjs --allow-development-version && node scripts/smoke-agent-skill-install.mjs
scripts.test:skill:release: npm run build && node scripts/test-agent-skill-validator.mjs && node scripts/test-skill-tree-hash.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-skill.mjs && node scripts/smoke-agent-skill-install.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:engine && npm run typecheck:cli
